CREATE TABLE rsa_keys (id INT PRIMARY KEY, key_name VARCHAR(255), key_size INT);
INSERT INTO rsa_keys (id, key_name, key_size) VALUES (1, 'myRSAkey', 1024);
INSERT INTO rsa_keys (id, key_name, key_size) VALUES (2, 'boundaryKey', 2048);
INSERT INTO rsa_keys (id, key_name, key_size) VALUES (3, 'minKey', 512);
INSERT INTO rsa_keys (id, key_name, key_size) VALUES (4, 'maxKey', 4096);
SELECT xenc_key_RSA_create(key_name, key_size) FROM rsa_keys WHERE id = 1;
SELECT xenc_key_RSA_create(key_name, key_size) FROM rsa_keys WHERE key_size BETWEEN 512 AND 4096;
WITH temp_keys AS (SELECT key_name, key_size FROM rsa_keys WHERE key_size < 2048) SELECT xenc_key_RSA_create(key_name, key_size) FROM temp_keys;
SELECT xenc_key_RSA_create('testKey1', 1024) AS generated_key, xenc_key_RSA_create('testKey2', 3072) AS another_key;
INSERT INTO rsa_keys (id, key_name, key_size) SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(), 'dynamicKey' || id, 1024 + id * 256 FROM UNNEST(ARRAY[1, 2, 3, 4, 5]) AS id;
SELECT key_name, (SELECT xenc_key_RSA_create(key_name, key_size) FROM rsa_keys WHERE key_name = 'myRSAkey') AS generated_key FROM rsa_keys WHERE key_size < 2048;
